en: Oh, shut up. Shut up. Don't snivel, Mrs. Hudson.
It'll do nothing to impede the flight of a bullet.
ko: 훌쩍이지 마세요 허드슨 부인. 총알이 날아가는 걸 막진 못하니까요

en: What a tender world that would be. Oh, please, Tony, shut up.
I believe you have something that we want, Mr. Holmes.
ko: 우리가 원하는 걸 가지고 계신 것 같은데요 홈즈 씨. 왜 직접 물어보지 않죠?

en: Why don't you ask for it? No.
Please, God. I've been asking this one.
ko: 이 분한테 물어봤는데 아무것도 모르는 것 같더라고요

en: She doesn't seem to know anything. But you know what I'm asking for, don't you, Mr. Holmes?
ko: 하지만 제가 뭘 찾는지 아시죠, 홈즈 씨?

en: ♪♪ First, get rid of your boys. Why? I dislike being outnumbered.
ko: 먼저 부하들을 보내요. 왜요? 수적 열세는 싫어요. 방 안에 바보가 너무 많아지거든요

en: It makes for too much stupid in the room.
ko: 먼저 부하들을 보내요. 왜요? 수적 열세는 싫어요. 방 안에 바보가 너무 많아지거든요

en: You two, go to the car.
